attack_chain.description: Exploit Public-Facing Application to inject malicious SQL code into the login page
attack_chain.mitigation: Update Software: Apply security patches promptly, especially for internet-facing applications. Deploy WAF rules. Conduct regular vulnerability scanning and penetration testing.
tool_commands: msfconsole -x 'use exploit/multi/http/apache_log4j; set RHOSTS target; exploit'

attack_chain.description: Malicious Copy and Paste of injected SQL code into the login form
attack_chain.mitigation: General Best Practices: Apply defense-in-depth principles: network segmentation, least-privilege access, endpoint detection and response (EDR), security awareness training, regular patching, and monitoring.

attack_chain.description: Domain Controller Authentication to obtain valid login credentials
attack_chain.mitigation: General Best Practices: Apply defense-in-depth principles: network segmentation, least-privilege access, endpoint detection and response (EDR), security awareness training, regular patching, and monitoring.

attack_chain.description: Web Session Cookie extraction to obtain session ID
attack_chain.mitigation: General Best Practices: Apply defense-in-depth principles: network segmentation, least-privilege access, endpoint detection and response (EDR), security awareness training, regular patching, and monitoring.

attack_chain.description: Web Cookies analysis to identify session ID and other sensitive information
attack_chain.mitigation: General Best Practices: Apply defense-in-depth principles: network segmentation, least-privilege access, endpoint detection and response (EDR), security awareness training, regular patching, and monitoring.

attack_chain.description: Input Capture to obtain login credentials and session ID
attack_chain.mitigation: General Best Practices: Apply defense-in-depth principles: network segmentation, least-privilege access, endpoint detection and response (EDR), security awareness training, regular patching, and monitoring.

attack_chain.description: Local Accounts creation to maintain persistence
attack_chain.mitigation: Multi-factor Authentication: Enforce MFA for all remote access and privileged accounts. Monitor for anomalous login patterns, impossible travel, and credential stuffing.

attack_chain.description: Boot or Logon Initialization Scripts modification to maintain persistence
attack_chain.mitigation: General Best Practices: Apply defense-in-depth principles: network segmentation, least-privilege access, endpoint detection and response (EDR), security awareness training, regular patching, and monitoring.
